creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 158575
security/vuxml update with Squid 2015:2 advisory info

Short log for SVN:
- Revise Squid entry based off 2015:2 security advisory

Details:
- Neck the entry down to just the one security issue -- remove the following verbiage from the pre-release announcement  

"apparently vulnerable to DoS .... This has not been verified as it also seems to require outdated (0.9.8l and older) OpenSSL libraries."

- Expand impacted version range to match up with the official advisory.
"Affected versions:      Squid 0.x -> 3.5.5

- Update modified tag and references

Other:
- CVE request is still ongoing:
http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2015/07/09/3
